description: Shadow Venomoth showcase team paired with Shadow Kingdra and a (party hat) Blastoise for the Summer Cup Great League meta. Venomoth spams Sigh Wave for energy, applies Poison Fang defense debuffs, and can flip losing matchups, while the double water line of Kingdra and Blastoise punishes the abundant fire/incinerate leads.
performanceNotes: Venomoth stole games by double-debuffing opponents' defense with repeated Poison Fangs, even beating super-effective fire attackers
Double water line (Kingdra + Blastoise) hard-punishes the common Incinerate leads in Summer Cup
Only lost when perfectly hard-countered by a healthy Macargo behind a fire lead

sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion
sources.videoTitle: The BEST Shadow Venomoth Player in the World!! | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Summer Cup team built around Shadow Blaziken running Counter (over the PvPoke-recommended fire fast move) to punish teams that are ABA-weak to fighting, with Lickilicky as a bulky safe swap and Shadow Toucannon as the flying closer. Blaziken hard-pivots in to shred fighting-weak cores while Lickilicky acts as a meat shield and Toucannon cleans up.
performanceNotes: Climbed hard with multiple 4-1 and 5-0 sets, to the point of running out of opponents at leaderboard ELO
Counter Blaziken feasts on teams weak to fighting (e.g. Furret/Gardevoir, Lickilicky + Cradily/Golem backlines)
Struggles with electrics — Charjabug, Stunfisk, and Zebstrika/Emolga-type threats give the team trouble

sources.author: CalebPeng
sources.videoTitle: THERE'S NO ONE LEFT TO BATTLE

description: Cradily lead in a meta with no fighting types, Empoleon as a spammy safe swap that mirrors meta steels, and Turtonator (fire/dragon) as the closer to light up steels like Forretress and Empoleon that would otherwise wall the lead.
performanceNotes: Cradily is the #1 ranked Pokémon with no fighting in the meta and rock-typing resisting normal moves
Turtonator handles the steels Cradily/Empoleon struggle with and is strong on its own

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best SUMMER CUP Teams | Top RANKED SUMMER CUP POKEMON | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: The straight top-three PvPoke meta team that the creator admits to running as a 'meta slave' — Cradily, Kingdra, and Forretress. Cradily runs Acid to beat Abomasnow, and Forretress uses Sand Tomb to punish Magnezone.
performanceNotes: Covers the bulk of the top meta picks
Cradily with Acid now beats Abomasnow, the old anti-meta
Forretress Sand Tomb nearly one-shots Shadow Magnezone

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Summer Cup Great League edittion | Pokemon GO PvP

description: Empoleon lead with a double-dragon back of Drampa (safe swap) and Kingdra (closer). Dragons roam free in the Summer Cup meta, and Empoleon leads while Kingdra absorbs energy since Drampa is glassy; Drampa aims to sweep as a closer with shield advantage.
performanceNotes: Dragons are strong/free in the meta with 3 in the top 20 ranked Pokemon
Creator running a 62.2% win rate this season
Kingdra used to absorb super-effective damage since Drampa is very glassy

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: DOUBLE DRAGON MAKES Summer Cup EASY

description: Kingdra, the top-ranked dragon, leads using Swift as a bait into spammy Surf; Forretress runs Bug Bite for more consistent neutral damage with only one weakness, and Galarian Stunfisk covers Kingdra's steel matchups.
performanceNotes: Kingdra resists 4 of 6 cup typings and is spammy across shield scenarios
Forretress (bug/steel) has only a fire weakness and 9-12 resistances
Stunfisk covers the steel problems Kingdra struggles with

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best SUMMER CUP Teams | Top RANKED SUMMER CUP POKEMON | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: Shadow Bug Bite Forretress lead into Furret with Toxapex as the closer. Extremely flexible line that can be played as an XAB or ABC depending on the lead; the first two Pokémon stack debuffs (Sand Tomb, Rock Tomb, Brick Break) while Toxapex acts as an unkillable wall to close.
performanceNotes: Very consistent results; repeatedly wins even from negative leads and into core-breaking comps
Beat double-electric backlines thanks to Toxapex's bulk and Furret's Swift/Sucker Punch cleanup
Only reliable core breaker is Scorching Sands Kanto Ninetales; even Jellicent is manageable

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: I think I just found the BEST TEAM for the Summer Cup Meta!
